name: Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. 5.25% Class A Preferred Limited Partnership Units Series 17
summary: Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. 5.25% Class A Preferred Limited Partnership Units Series 17 represents preferred equity in Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. These units offer a fixed dividend rate and have a preference over common units in the event of liquidation. Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. is a global renewable power platform.
